attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NSLSDD.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY AS SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY,
NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT AS SHIPSET_NUMBER_INT,
NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
COALESCE( SSED.STATUS_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_EVENT_TYPE_CD,
SSED.STATUS_MET_DATE AS BK_EVENT_DTM,
CAST(SSED.STATUS_MET_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_EVENT_DT,
SSED.EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE AS EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DTM,
CAST(SSED.EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DT,
COALESCE( SSED.FLIGHT_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS FLIGHT_NUM,
COALESCE( SSED.HOUSE_AIRWAY_BILL,'UNKNOWN') AS HOUSE_AIRWAYBILL_NUM,
COALESCE( SSED.MASTER_AIRWAY_BILL,'UNKNOWN')  AS MASTER_AIRWAYBILL_NUM,
COALESCE( SSED.NUMBER_OF_PIECES,-999) AS PIECE_CNT,
(CASE WHEN NSOLSDE.BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT IS NOT NULL AND NSOLSDE.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY IS NOT NULL  AND NSOLSDE.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NOT NULL AND  NSOLSDE.BK_EVENT_TYPE_CD  IS NOT NULL THEN  'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS  DML_TYPE,
/* Changes for Milestone SLA*/                 
CASE WHEN SSED.NOTIFIED_TO_CARRIER IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE SSED.NOTIFIED_TO_CARRIER END AS SEQUENCE_STATUS,
/* End of Changes for Milestone SLA*/ 
COALESCE (SSED.PARTNER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS FREIGHT_CARRIER_ID
FROM
(SELECT
B2B_MESSAGE_ID,
MASTER_AIRWAY_BILL,
HOUSE_AIRWAY_BILL ,
FLIGHT_NUMBER     ,
NUMBER_OF_PIECES   ,
STATUS_CODE   ,
STATUS_MET_DATE         ,
SHIP_SET_NUMBER         ,
ORDER_NUMBER              ,
DELIVERY_ID     ,
EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE ,
SEQUENCE_STATUS,
NOTIFIED_TO_CARRIER,
PARTNER_NAME
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_IFC WHERE DELIVERY_ID IS NOT NULL AND B2B_MESSAGE_ID IS NOT NULL
UNION 
SELECT
B2B_MESSAGE_ID,
MASTER_AIRWAY_BILL  ,
HOUSE_AIRWAY_BILL     ,
FLIGHT_NUMBER              ,
NUMBER_OF_PIECES      ,
STATUS_CODE   ,
STATUS_MET_DATE         ,
SHIP_SET_NUMBER         ,
ORDER_NUMBER              ,
DELIVERY_ID      ,
EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE,
SEQUENCE_STATUS,
NOTIFIED_TO_CARRIER,
PARTNER_NAME
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_IFC WHERE DELIVERY_ID IS NOT NULL AND B2B_MESSAGE_ID IS NOT NULL) SSED

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON SSED.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPSET  NS
ON cast(SSED.SHIP_SET_NUMBER as integer)=NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT
AND  NS.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_ASSIGNM EWDA
ON SSED.DELIVERY_ID= EWDA.DELIVERY_ID
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_SO_LINE_SHPMNT_DELIVERY_DTL  NSLSDD
ON NSLSDD.SK_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID_INT=EWDA.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
LEFT JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_SLS_ORD_LN_SHPMNT_DLVRY_EVNT NSOLSDE
ON  NSOLSDE.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY=NSLSDD.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY
AND NSOLSDE.BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT = NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT
AND NSOLSDE.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND NSOLSDE.BK_EVENT_TYPE_CD = SSED.STATUS_CODE

SELECT SCXDSHI.B2B_MESSAGE_ID, SCXDSHI.MESSAGE_PRIORITY, SCXDSHI.PARTNER_NAME, 
SCXDSHI.STATUS_DATE, SCXDSHI.ORDER_NUMBER, SCXDSHI.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, 
SCXDSHI.ORIGIN_AIRPORT_CODE, SCXDSHI.DESTINATION_AIRPORT_CODE, SCXDSHI.DELIVERY_ID,
SCXDSHI.COUNTRY_EXP_IMP, SCXDSHI.EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE, SCXDSHI.STATUS_MET_DATE,
SCXDSHI.STATUS_CODE, SCXDSHI.CITY_NAME, SCXDSHI.COUNTRY_NAME, SCXDSHI.STATE_NAME, 
SCXDSHI.MASTER_AIRWAY_BILL, SCXDSHI.HOUSE_AIRWAY_BILL, SCXDSHI.CARRIER_REFERENCE, 
SCXDSHI.FLIGHT_NUMBER, SCXDSHI.NUMBER_OF_PIECES, SCXDSHI.RECORD_STATUS, SCXDSHI.ERROR_MESSAGE, 
SCXDSHI.CREATED_BY, SCXDSHI.CREATION_DATE, SCXDSHI.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SCXDSHI.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SCXDSHI.CONCURRENT_PROGRAM_REQUEST, SCXDSHI.ID, SCXDSHI.RRN_EXISTS_FLAG, SCXDSHI.DOMAIN_NAME, 
SCXDSHI.OTM_INTERFACE_STATUS, SCXDSHI.RETRY_COUNT, SCXDSHI.OTM_TRANSMISSION_NUMBER,
SCXDSHI.OTM_TRANSMISSION_ERRORS, SCXDSHI.NOTIFIED_TO_CARRIER, SCXDSHI.COUNTER_VALUE, 
SCXDSHI.SEQUENCE_STATUS, SCXDSHI.ATTRIBUTE1, SCXDSHI.ATTRIBUTE2, SCXDSHI.ATTRIBUTE3, SCXDSHI.ATTRIBUTE4, 
SCXDSHI.ATTRIBUTE5, SCXDSHI.ATTRIBUTE6, SCXDSHI.ATTRIBUTE7, SCXDSHI.ATTRIBUTE8, SCXDSHI.ATTRIBUTE9, 
SCXDSHI.ATTRIBUTE10, SCXDSHI.ATTRIBUTE11, SCXDSHI.ATTRIBUTE12, SCXDSHI.ATTRIBUTE13, SCXDSHI.ATTRIBUTE14, 
SCXDSHI.ATTRIBUTE15, SCXDSHI.GLOBAL_NAME, SCXDSHI.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, SCXDSHI.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, 
SCXDSHI.REFRESH_DATETIME ,'RI' AS  EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_IFC  SCXDSHI
left join  
(
SELECT  EWDA.DELIVERY_ID DELIVERY_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_ASSIGNM EWDA,
$$INVFLMTVWDB.N_SO_LINE_SHPMNT_DELIVERY_DTL  NSLSDD 
WHERE  NSLSDD.SK_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID_INT=EWDA.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID GROUP BY 1
)  tbl on
    SCXDSHI.DELIVERY_ID = tbl.DELIVERY_ID
                
left join
(select NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT BK_SO_NUMBER_INT, NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPSET NS, $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO where NS.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY ) tbl2 on 
cast(SCXDSHI.SHIP_SET_NUMBER as integer) = tbl2.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT and 
 tbl2.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT= SCXDSHI.ORDER_NUMBER
WHERE  (SCXDSHI.B2B_MESSAGE_ID IS NOT NULL  AND SCXDSHI.DELIVERY_ID IS NOT NULL) 
AND (tbl2.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT  IS NULL OR   tbl.DELIVERY_ID IS NULL )
